subcodes.first_line: By God! O My Name Jim, thy letter was recited before the Throne, and from it were inhaled the sweet fragrances of thy love for God. He beareth witness unto this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تالله یا اسمی الجیم قد قرء لدی العرش کتابک و وجدت منه نفحات حبک لله یشهد بذلک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
